description: Analyze the evidence image /home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd using both Autopsy and TSK command-line tools to produce a cross-validation report. Create a forensic case named 'QA_Crossval_2024' with case number 'INV-QAV-010' in Autopsy. Capture the recursive file listing and metadata from TSK and save the raw output to /home/ga/Reports/tsk_raw_output.txt. Generate a pipe-delimited TSK file inventory at /home/ga/Reports/crossval_tsk_inventory.txt and a matching Autopsy file inventory at /home/ga/Reports/crossval_autopsy_inventory.txt, both using the header: INODE|ALLOC_STATUS|FILE_TYPE|FULL_PATH|FILENAME. Finally, produce a cross-validation report at /home/ga/Reports/crossval_report.txt containing the following sections: 1. IMAGE_METADATA: (sector size, total size, filesystem type); 2. TSK_FILE_COUNT: N; 3. AUTOPSY_FILE_COUNT: N; 4. TSK_ALLOCATED: N / TSK_DELETED: N; 5. AUTOPSY_ALLOCATED: N / AUTOPSY_DELETED: N; 6. DISCREPANCIES: N; 7. HASH_VERIFICATIONS: (at least 3 lines comparing file hashes between tools, formatted as: INODE <n>: <filename> MD5=<hash> MATCH=YES/NO); 8. QA_CONCLUSION: (VERIFIED or DISCREPANCIES_FOUND).
